detail_raw_text:
回上一頁	國立金門大學	 
 	教學綱要	 

部別 : 日間部學士班	114學年度第1學期	列印日期 : 2026/05/24
科目名稱 : 專題研究(二) (Directed Research II)	開課班級 : 應英四年級	學　　分 : 2.0	授課時數 : 2.0
授課教師 : 李盈興陳宛利	必選修 : 必修	 	 


1.教學目標
This course aims to help students complete a project of their topic throughout this semester. Survey (using questionnaires) is introduced, among the other methods, to collect the data on (but not limited to) second language (L2) research. Students will learn to ask their research questions, construct and administer the questionnaires, process the data, and make a well-organized presentation. 


2.教學綱要
The content of this semester contains:
- Making a logical proposal
- Finding resources and reviewing previous studies
- Designing a survey
- Data collection, analysis, and graphing
- Writing APA-style papers
- Presenting research results

6.成績評定及課堂要求
Evaluations: (1) Assignments 30% (2) Proposals 30% (3) Presentation 30% (4) Participation 10%. 
 
 


8.永續發展目標(SDGs)：SDG4 優質教育
